title: Pet Custody Agreement
description: Cohabitation or post-breakup agreement detailing pet visitation schedules, veterinary splits, and custody rights.
whatsCovered: Primary physical custody and ownership designation
Split of veterinary invoices and surgical costs
Daily care, food, and boarding cost allocations
Procedures if one partner must relocate
whenToUse: Use this contract to coordinate custody and veterinary costs for a shared pet if partners separate.

fields.label: Vet Bill Split (Party A% / Party B%)

clauses.heading: PET CUSTODY AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Pet Custody Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Pet Ownership Splits
clauses.body: Ownership of pet {pet_name} is assigned to First Party. Future veterinary bills shall be shared matching split: {vet_cost_split}.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
